TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O kayki no niyaro O tatyalen, malorikec no 'Amis kasa'etal i, saheto o tomok ato citodong no ciwlo ko mamireko. O ata'akay to a demak patayraen to i finawlan a masasowal. Lima polo' to ko mihecaan no tamdaw no niyaro' o mato'asay to ko sa'osi, o tayal to sakiomah pafelien to ko tamdaw no laloma'an, toladay sato itira sato i taloan mikapot to malotatayalen no sakifinawlan a demak. O tomok ato citodongay no ciwlo ko mamisa'icel mitayal to tayal no kapolongan . O cacitodong to ciwlo i , itira i selal no ciwlo mipili' to malokakeridan, o citodongay to ciwlo i o mamitomadaw to tayal no tomok, mikapot to sakowan no niyaro', oni a tayal tangasa i tolas no 'orip, ci safaw ko malotamdaw to laday, ano adihay to ko awaay ta miceroh to tamdaw, sa'osi caay pipatodong mitongal to tamdaw. Tatosa anca tatolo lalima ano caciyaw masasowal han no Pangcah; deng no tamdaw aca ka saopo maco han; no malinaay kasaopo i masaopo han; no 'alomanay masaopo a malalicalicay i mitengil han, onini i malecad o kayki no niyaro' koni tatodong nira. Sakacecay potipot, Kayki no niyaro' o tomok, citodongay no ciwlo ato fafaed to no kapah a tamdaw ko kasakapot, tatiih mikapot ko fafahiyan. Sakatosa kalisaotan, Itini i taloan ko kasaopan ko kayki no niyaro, roma i pakatar sa i loma' no tomok anca itira i loma' no citodongay no ciwlo. Sakatolo milesafon, Doedo sa to pinangan no finacadan, 'ayaw no dadaya kalic sa i fadahoc no sefi milekal pakafana to tamdaw no finawlan. Ano lalinike a demak, o papeloay, tarokos anca paratohay a selal tayra i loma' pakafana', nika no niyaro a kayki saheto tayra i tongroh no fadahong a milekal pakafana'. Sakasepat faco no kayki, Awaay ko patosokan to faco no kayji, o pikaykian ko kacipinangan. No 'Amis a 'etal o Pokpok, Nataoran a niyaro', pasitimol ko aro' no tomok, pangkiw no taliyok ko aro' no finawlan misi'ayaw. " Pakaso'elin pasitimol ko pisin no tomok, nawhan nai timolay ko kawas no Pangcah Cimatitian, itiraay ko sofoc nira, orasaka mapatay to cingra pasayra i timol ko rakat no salo'afang", ano misatapang to ko kayki pasayra i timol ko pising misi'ayaw to salo'afang "Tato'asan, o widang " ko tomok, mitolon misalongoc paini to sakacitaneng ato fangcalay a lekakawa, mahrek to pakafana' to malosasowasowalen no 'alomanay a demak, maherek to milongoc to paini no 'alomanay ta pakafana' to no tireng a nisafaloco'an, mapaini to no cifenekay to masamaanay fangcalay painian, matongal ho no citodongay no ciwlo a maainini o fangcal to. Sakalima paini to naherekan a mikayki a demak, o tata;akay a demak caayay to kafilo no tomok ato ciwlo patalahekalen maainini, caayay pali'ayaw mitelek to masamanay a demak. Sakaenem kaciepoc no niketonan a mikayki, O miketonan to nikayki a demak tati'ih a maliyan midoedo to tatayalen, matoyol, mico'a'ang to rikec doedo sa tata'akay mimingay anca lahoday karetengay ko pi'arawan patefoc to mipa'oripan a pinanowan. O nika ira ko lekakawa a kayki no niyaro', orasaka, ano adihadihay ko dademaken no niyaro' no Pangcah paemin patatodong to kahantala no tamdaw a mireko, sa ira ko sowal o noniyah to sakowan to niyaro' koni.
S.PHON: o~u kajki no~u nijaro~u o~u tatjaɾən, maɾo~urikəʦ no~u ʡamis kasaʡətaɾ i, saħəto~u o~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦiwɾo~u ko~u mamirəko~u. o~u ataʡakaj to~u a ɬ~ɮəmak patajraən to~u i finawɾan a masaso~uwaɾ. ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ to~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u mato~uʡasaj to~u ko~u saʡo~usi, o~u tajaɾ to~u sakio~umaħ pafəɾiən to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, to~uɾaɬ~ɮaj sato~u itira sato~u i taɾo~uan mikapo~ut to~u maɾo~utatajaɾən no~u sakifinawɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u ko~u mamisaʡiʦəɾ mitajaɾ to~u tajaɾ no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan . o~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦiwɾo~u i , itira i səɾaɾ no~u ʦiwɾo~u mipiɾiʡ to~u maɾo~ukakəriɬ~ɮan, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ʦiwɾo~u i o~u mamito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ no~u to~umo~uk, mikapo~ut to~u sako~uwan no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~uni a tajaɾ taŋasa i to~uɾas no~u ʡo~urip, ʦi safaw ko~u maɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u awaaj ta miʦəro~uħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saʡo~usi ʦaaj pipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mito~uŋaɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. tato~usa anʦa tato~uɾo~u ɾaɾima ano~u ʦaʦijaw masaso~uwaɾ ħan no~u paŋʦaħ; ɬ~ɮəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦa ka sao~upo~u maʦo~u ħan; no~u maɾinaaj kasao~upo~u i masao~upo~u ħan; no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj masao~upo~u a maɾaɾiʦaɾiʦaj i mitəŋiɾ ħan, o~unini i maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ nira. sakaʦəʦaj po~utipo~ut, kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u to~umo~uk, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u fafaəɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kapaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kasakapo~ut, tatiiħ mikapo~ut ko~u fafaħijan. sakato~usa kaɾisao~utan, itini i taɾo~uan ko~u kasao~upan ko~u kajki no~u nijaro~u, ro~uma i pakatar sa i ɾo~umaʡ no~u to~umo~uk anʦa itira i ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u. sakato~uɾo~u miɾəsafo~un, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa to~u pinaŋan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʡajaw no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja kaɾiʦ sa i faɬ~ɮaħo~uʦ no~u səfi miɾəkaɾ pakafana to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u finawɾan. ano~u ɾaɾinikə a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u papəɾo~uaj, taro~uko~us anʦa parato~uħaj a səɾaɾ tajra i ɾo~umaʡ pakafanaʡ, nika no~u nijaro~u a kajki saħəto~u tajra i to~uŋro~uħ no~u faɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ a miɾəkaɾ pakafanaʡ. sakasəpat faʦo~u no~u kajki, awaaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan to~u faʦo~u no~u kajji, o~u pikajkian ko~u kaʦipinaŋan. no~u ʡamis a ʡətaɾ o~u po~ukpo~uk, natao~uran a nijaro~uʡ, pasitimo~uɾ ko~u aro~uʡ no~u to~umo~uk, paŋkiw no~u taɾijo~uk ko~u aro~uʡ no~u finawɾan misiʡajaw. " pakaso~uʡəɾin pasitimo~uɾ ko~u pisin no~u to~umo~uk, nawħan nai timo~uɾaj ko~u kawas no~u paŋʦaħ ʦimatitian, itiraaj ko~u so~ufo~uʦ nira, o~urasaka mapataj to~u ʦiŋra pasajra i timo~uɾ ko~u rakat no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ", ano~u misatapaŋ to~u ko~u kajki pasajra i timo~uɾ ko~u pisiŋ misiʡajaw to~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ "tato~uʡasan, o~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ " ko~u to~umo~uk, mito~uɾo~un misaɾo~uŋo~uʦ paini to~u sakaʦitanəŋ ato~u faŋʦaɾaj a ɾəkakawa, maħrək to~u pakafanaʡ to~u maɾo~usaso~uwaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, maħərək to~u miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u paini no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ta pakafanaʡ to~u no~u tirəŋ a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, mapaini to~u no~u ʦifənəkaj to~u masamaanaj faŋʦaɾaj painian, mato~uŋaɾ ħo~u no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u a maainini o~u faŋʦaɾ to~u. sakaɾima paini to~u naħərəkan a mikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tata;akaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaajaj to~u kafiɾo~u no~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦiwɾo~u pataɾaħəkaɾən maainini, ʦaajaj paɾiʡajaw mitəɾək to~u masamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. sakaənəm kaʦiəpo~uʦ no~u nikəto~unan a mikajki, o~u mikəto~unan to~u nikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak tatiʡiħ a maɾijan miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u tatajaɾən, mato~ujo~uɾ, miʦo~uʡaʡaŋ to~u rikəʦ ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa tataʡakaj mimiŋaj anʦa ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj karətəŋaj ko~u piʡarawan patəfo~uʦ to~u mipaʡo~uripan a pinano~uwan. o~u nika ira ko~u ɾəkakawa a kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ paəmin patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaħantaɾa no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mirəko~u, sa ira ko~u so~uwaɾ o~u no~unijaħ to~u sako~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni.
S.FORM: O kayki no niyaro O tatyalen, malorikec no 'Amis kasa'etal i, saheto o tomok ato citodong no ciwlo ko mamireko. O ata'akay to a demak patayraen to i finawlan a masasowal. Lima polo' to ko mihecaan no tamdaw no niyaro' o mato'asay to ko sa'osi, o tayal to sakiomah pafelien to ko tamdaw no laloma'an, toladay sato itira sato i taloan mikapot to malotatayalen no sakifinawlan a demak. O tomok ato citodongay no ciwlo ko mamisa'icel mitayal to tayal no kapolongan . O cacitodong to ciwlo i , itira i selal no ciwlo mipili' to malokakeridan, o citodongay to ciwlo i o mamitomadaw to tayal no tomok, mikapot to sakowan no niyaro', oni a tayal tangasa i tolas no 'orip, ci safaw ko malotamdaw to laday, ano adihay to ko awaay ta miceroh to tamdaw, sa'osi caay pipatodong mitongal to tamdaw. Tatosa anca tatolo lalima ano caciyaw masasowal han no Pangcah; deng no tamdaw aca ka saopo maco han; no malinaay kasaopo i masaopo han; no 'alomanay masaopo a malalicalicay i mitengil han, onini i malecad o kayki no niyaro' koni tatodong nira. Sakacecay potipot, Kayki no niyaro' o tomok, citodongay no ciwlo ato fafaed to no kapah a tamdaw ko kasakapot, tatiih mikapot ko fafahiyan. Sakatosa kalisaotan, Itini i taloan ko kasaopan ko kayki no niyaro, roma i pakatar sa i loma' no tomok anca itira i loma' no citodongay no ciwlo. Sakatolo milesafon, Doedo sa to pinangan no finacadan, 'ayaw no dadaya kalic sa i fadahoc no sefi milekal pakafana to tamdaw no finawlan. Ano lalinike a demak, o papeloay, tarokos anca paratohay a selal tayra i loma' pakafana', nika no niyaro a kayki saheto tayra i tongroh no fadahong a milekal pakafana'. Sakasepat faco no kayki, Awaay ko patosokan to faco no kayji, o pikaykian ko kacipinangan. No 'Amis a 'etal o Pokpok, Nataoran a niyaro', pasitimol ko aro' no tomok, pangkiw no taliyok ko aro' no finawlan misi'ayaw. " Pakaso'elin pasitimol ko pisin no tomok, nawhan nai timolay ko kawas no Pangcah Cimatitian, itiraay ko sofoc nira, orasaka mapatay to cingra pasayra i timol ko rakat no salo'afang", ano misatapang to ko kayki pasayra i timol ko pising misi'ayaw to salo'afang "Tato'asan, o widang " ko tomok, mitolon misalongoc paini to sakacitaneng ato fangcalay a lekakawa, mahrek to pakafana' to malosasowasowalen no 'alomanay a demak, maherek to milongoc to paini no 'alomanay ta pakafana' to no tireng a nisafaloco'an, mapaini to no cifenekay to masamaanay fangcalay painian, matongal ho no citodongay no ciwlo a maainini o fangcal to. Sakalima paini to naherekan a mikayki a demak, o tata;akay a demak caayay to kafilo no tomok ato ciwlo patalahekalen maainini, caayay pali'ayaw mitelek to masamanay a demak. Sakaenem kaciepoc no niketonan a mikayki, O miketonan to nikayki a demak tati'ih a maliyan midoedo to tatayalen, matoyol, mico'a'ang to rikec doedo sa tata'akay mimingay anca lahoday karetengay ko pi'arawan patefoc to mipa'oripan a pinanowan. O nika ira ko lekakawa a kayki no niyaro', orasaka, ano adihadihay ko dademaken no niyaro' no Pangcah paemin patatodong to kahantala no tamdaw a mireko, sa ira ko sowal o noniyah to sakowan to niyaro' koni.
S.PHON: o~u kajki no~u nijaro~u o~u tatjaɾən, maɾo~urikəʦ no~u ʡamis kasaʡətaɾ i, saħəto~u o~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦiwɾo~u ko~u mamirəko~u. o~u ataʡakaj to~u a ɬ~ɮəmak patajraən to~u i finawɾan a masaso~uwaɾ. ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ to~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u mato~uʡasaj to~u ko~u saʡo~usi, o~u tajaɾ to~u sakio~umaħ pafəɾiən to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, to~uɾaɬ~ɮaj sato~u itira sato~u i taɾo~uan mikapo~ut to~u maɾo~utatajaɾən no~u sakifinawɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u ko~u mamisaʡiʦəɾ mitajaɾ to~u tajaɾ no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan . o~u ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦiwɾo~u i , itira i səɾaɾ no~u ʦiwɾo~u mipiɾiʡ to~u maɾo~ukakəriɬ~ɮan, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u ʦiwɾo~u i o~u mamito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ no~u to~umo~uk, mikapo~ut to~u sako~uwan no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~uni a tajaɾ taŋasa i to~uɾas no~u ʡo~urip, ʦi safaw ko~u maɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u awaaj ta miʦəro~uħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saʡo~usi ʦaaj pipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mito~uŋaɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. tato~usa anʦa tato~uɾo~u ɾaɾima ano~u ʦaʦijaw masaso~uwaɾ ħan no~u paŋʦaħ; ɬ~ɮəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦa ka sao~upo~u maʦo~u ħan; no~u maɾinaaj kasao~upo~u i masao~upo~u ħan; no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj masao~upo~u a maɾaɾiʦaɾiʦaj i mitəŋiɾ ħan, o~unini i maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ nira. sakaʦəʦaj po~utipo~ut, kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u to~umo~uk, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u ato~u fafaəɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kapaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kasakapo~ut, tatiiħ mikapo~ut ko~u fafaħijan. sakato~usa kaɾisao~utan, itini i taɾo~uan ko~u kasao~upan ko~u kajki no~u nijaro~u, ro~uma i pakatar sa i ɾo~umaʡ no~u to~umo~uk anʦa itira i ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u. sakato~uɾo~u miɾəsafo~un, ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa to~u pinaŋan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ʡajaw no~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja kaɾiʦ sa i faɬ~ɮaħo~uʦ no~u səfi miɾəkaɾ pakafana to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u finawɾan. ano~u ɾaɾinikə a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u papəɾo~uaj, taro~uko~us anʦa parato~uħaj a səɾaɾ tajra i ɾo~umaʡ pakafanaʡ, nika no~u nijaro~u a kajki saħəto~u tajra i to~uŋro~uħ no~u faɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ a miɾəkaɾ pakafanaʡ. sakasəpat faʦo~u no~u kajki, awaaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan to~u faʦo~u no~u kajji, o~u pikajkian ko~u kaʦipinaŋan. no~u ʡamis a ʡətaɾ o~u po~ukpo~uk, natao~uran a nijaro~uʡ, pasitimo~uɾ ko~u aro~uʡ no~u to~umo~uk, paŋkiw no~u taɾijo~uk ko~u aro~uʡ no~u finawɾan misiʡajaw. " pakaso~uʡəɾin pasitimo~uɾ ko~u pisin no~u to~umo~uk, nawħan nai timo~uɾaj ko~u kawas no~u paŋʦaħ ʦimatitian, itiraaj ko~u so~ufo~uʦ nira, o~urasaka mapataj to~u ʦiŋra pasajra i timo~uɾ ko~u rakat no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ", ano~u misatapaŋ to~u ko~u kajki pasajra i timo~uɾ ko~u pisiŋ misiʡajaw to~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ "tato~uʡasan, o~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ " ko~u to~umo~uk, mito~uɾo~un misaɾo~uŋo~uʦ paini to~u sakaʦitanəŋ ato~u faŋʦaɾaj a ɾəkakawa, maħrək to~u pakafanaʡ to~u maɾo~usaso~uwaso~uwaɾən no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, maħərək to~u miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u paini no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ta pakafanaʡ to~u no~u tirəŋ a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, mapaini to~u no~u ʦifənəkaj to~u masamaanaj faŋʦaɾaj painian, mato~uŋaɾ ħo~u no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ʦiwɾo~u a maainini o~u faŋʦaɾ to~u. sakaɾima paini to~u naħərəkan a mikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tata;akaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaajaj to~u kafiɾo~u no~u to~umo~uk ato~u ʦiwɾo~u pataɾaħəkaɾən maainini, ʦaajaj paɾiʡajaw mitəɾək to~u masamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. sakaənəm kaʦiəpo~uʦ no~u nikəto~unan a mikajki, o~u mikəto~unan to~u nikajki a ɬ~ɮəmak tatiʡiħ a maɾijan miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u tatajaɾən, mato~ujo~uɾ, miʦo~uʡaʡaŋ to~u rikəʦ ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa tataʡakaj mimiŋaj anʦa ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj karətəŋaj ko~u piʡarawan patəfo~uʦ to~u mipaʡo~uripan a pinano~uwan. o~u nika ira ko~u ɾəkakawa a kajki no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~urasaka, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ paəmin patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaħantaɾa no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mirəko~u, sa ira ko~u so~uwaɾ o~u no~unijaħ to~u sako~uwan to~u nijaro~uʡ ko~uni.
